name: Definitions and Interpretation
text: Capitalized terms used in this Agreement shall have the meanings assigned to them herein or as commonly understood in law.

legal_basis.note: Certainty of terms — definitions prevent vagueness

invalid_if: Key terms are undefined or ambiguous
source: Indian Contract Act, 1872; General Clauses Act, 1897
title: Definitions
dispute_hotspots: Undefined 'Material Breach' — most litigated term in Indian contract disputes
Undefined 'Working Day' — impacts payment and notice period calculations
